responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Execute IVX Enterprise Scale Phase (backend hardening, load tests, final report) AND fix landing page deal cards to use new immersive full-bleed video card design matching the app reels.

## Constraints & Preferences
- Do not mark "100M VERIFIED" without measurable evidence (load-test logs, test IDs, p95/p99, error rates)
- Do not claim enterprise-scale readiness without load test data
- Never expose secret values
- Production APK uses `https://api.ivxholding.com` only
- Pre-existing unrelated test failures must be listed separately, not hidden
- Auto-stop load tests if error rate >50% or p95 >10s
- Landing page must match the new immersive full-bleed card design from screenshot 3 (overlay tags, title overlay, bottom action row, "Restyle with AI" badge), NOT the old card design (screenshot 1 with small stats row and gray/yellow buttons)

## Progress
### Done
- **P0 Release cutover completed** (prior phase):
  - Commit `e9740483788d` pushed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, deployed to Render
  - All endpoints verified, owner AI working, auth working, landing live
- **APK build completed**: v1.4.5, versionCode 36, 80.6 MB, SHA256 `750b158a7f97b20fd65a9927cae1d026b98a31122830171fe944ccc5cf9c00a8`, uploaded to tmpfiles.org
- **Phase 1 baseline load test**: 10-100 CC, 69-140 RPS, 0% errors, p95 up to 4s — PASS
- **Phase 2 Redis adapter wiring**: `attachRedisAdapter(io)` in `express-chat-server.ts`, falls back to in-memory when `REDIS_URL` absent
- **Phase 4 Database optimization**: `enterprise_indexes.sql` with 28+ indexes, `SELECT *` eliminated across 12 files (31 query sites), hotfix deployed for wrong column names
- **Phase 5 API hardening**: `ivx-enterprise-middleware.ts` with timeout, body limit, AI rate limit, security headers, observability — deployed and confirmed live
- **Phase 7 Realtime hardening**: `ivx-socket-auth.ts` with token verification, per-socket rate limiting, cleanup on disconnect, removed `allowEIO3`
- **Phase 8 Observability**: Enterprise metrics endpoint live at `/api/ivx/enterprise/metrics`
- **Enterprise middleware deployed**: Commit `4b7f40a380fa`, boot `2026-07-16T11:30:19.459Z`
- **Hotfix deployed for column names**: Commit `943633b98f71`, boot `2026-07-16T11:36:54.497Z`
- **Home-feed verified working**: Returns 200 with `deal_count: 3`, `video_count: 1`, 4 blocks (3 deals + 1 video) properly populated — blocks contain deal objects with id/name/city/deal_type/investment_amount/expected_roi and video objects with id/project_id/video_url
- **Final clean load test** (post-hotfix, commit `943633b`):
  - LOAD-10: 10 CC, 63.9 RPS, p50=1163ms, p95=1556ms, p99=1559ms, 0% errors — PASS
  - LOAD-100: 100 CC, 116.9 RPS, p50=2161ms, p95=3859ms, p99=4255ms, 0% errors — PASS
  - LOAD-1K: 1000 CC, 108.0 RPS, p50=5905ms, p95=11702ms, p99=17445ms, 0% errors — STOPPED (latency only, not errors)
  - LOAD-5K through LOAD-100K: SKIPPED (auto-stopped at 1K)
- **All 6 production endpoints verified returning 200**: `/health`, `/readiness`, `/api/ivx/video-platform/feed`, `/api/ivx/video-platform/home-feed`, `/api/ivx/enterprise/health`, `/api/ivx/enterprise/metrics`
- **Enterprise metrics confirmed live**: totalRequests 2651, errors 0, statusCodes {200: 2651}, p50=0ms, p95=1ms, p99=93ms, avg=7ms, RPS=15.41
- **All 11 enterprise scale phases marked completed** — final report compiled with infrastructure estimates ($125/mo at 100K, ~$42K/mo at 100M)
- **Landing page card design audit completed**:
  - Old card: `buildDealCardHtml()` in `index.html` line 6716, CSS at line 1907 — dark card with separate gallery + content sections, small stats row, gray "Details" + yellow "Invest Now" buttons
  - New card needed: immersive full-bleed 9:16 aspect ratio, overlay gradient, top badges (type + ACTIVE), right-side action icons (like/comment/save/share), bottom title block with stats, action pills, "Restyle with AI" badge, "View Deal" + "Invest Now" buttons, caption bar
- **Landing page CSS updated**: Added immersive full-bleed card CSS classes (`.live-deal-card`, `.ivx-imm-media`, `.ivx-imm-overlay`, `.ivx-imm-top`, `.ivx-imm-badges`, `.ivx-imm-badge`, `.ivx-imm-actions-right`, `.ivx-imm-icon`, `.ivx-imm-bottom`, `.ivx-imm-title`, `.ivx-imm-stats`, `.ivx-imm-actions-row`, `.ivx-imm-pill`, `.ivx-imm-btns`, `.ivx-imm-details`, `.ivx-imm-invest`, `.ivx-imm-caption`, `.ivx-imm-ai-badge`) with responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 col @700px, 3 col @1100px)
- **Landing page `buildDealCardHtml` rewritten**: Now generates new immersive card structure with full-bleed media container, gradient overlay, top badges, right-side action icons, bottom title/stats/pills/buttons/caption — replaces old separate gallery + content layout

### In Progress
- **Landing page immersive card update**: CSS and HTML generator rewritten in `index.html`, but `ivx-home-feed.js` video card still needs updating to match, then build + deploy + verify

### Blocked
- **Redis not deployed**: Code ready, `REDIS_URL` not set in Render — requires Render Redis addon
- **Autoscaling not active**: `render.yaml` declares STANDARD, actual deployment is FREE tier — requires Render plan upgrade
- **Database indexes not applied**: 28 indexes in `enterprise_indexes.sql` ready but not executed against Supabase
- **100M readiness NOT VERIFIED**: Requires Render plan upgrade, Redis, index application, and load testing at 5K+ CC with autoscaling

## Key Decisions
- Enterprise middleware ordered: CORS → securityHeaders → bodyLimit → requestTimeout → aiRateLimit → observability → logging (slow/error only)
- AI rate limit: 10 burst, 0.5/sec refill; Request timeout: 30s default, 120s AI; Body limit: 2MB standard, 16MB AI/upload
- WS auth: `IVX_WS_ALLOW_PUBLIC=true` for public chat; WS rate limit: 10 burst, 2/sec per socket
- Reduced log noise: only log requests >500ms or status >=400
- Landing card redesign: full-bleed 9:16 media with overlay gradient (top badges + right icons, bottom title/stats/buttons), NOT separate gallery + content sections
- Landing grid: 1 col mobile, 2 col @700px (max 420px), 3 col @1100px (max 380px)

## Next Steps
1. Update `ivx-home-feed.js` `buildVideoCard()` to match immersive card design
2. Build landing page locally and verify output HTML renders new cards
3. Deploy landing page to S3/CloudFront and invalidate CDN
4. Verify live landing page at `https://ivxholding.com` and capture proof evidence (screenshot/HTML)
5. (Enterprise scale follow-up) Upgrade Render plan, deploy Redis, apply indexes, re-run load tests at 5K+ CC

## Critical Context
- **Repository**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, branch: `main`
- **Current production backend commit**: `943633b98f71` (hotfix), boot `2026-07-16T11:36:54.497Z`
- **Backend health**: `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` → healthy, AI enabled, `openai/gpt-4o`
- **Enterprise metrics live**: `https://api.ivxholding.com/api/ivx/enterprise/metrics`
- **Security headers confirmed**: `x-ivx-enterprise: ivx-enterprise-middleware-2026-07-16`
- **Supabase project**: `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`, URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`
- **Actual jv_deals columns**: `id, title, project_name, type, description, total_investment, expected_roi, min_investment, status, published, property_address, city, state, zip_code, country, property_type, photos, created_at, updated_at, display_order, propertyValue, amount_raised, funds_raised, estimated_value, appraised_value, progress_percent`
- **Live data**: 3 jv_deals (Casa Rosario, Perez Residence/ONE STOP DEVELOPMENT LLC, JV-202603-5190/IVX JACKSONVILLE PRIME), 10 project_videos, 4 members
- **Landing page files**: `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` (452KB, main HTML+CSS+JS), `expo/ivxholding-landing/ivx-home-feed.js` (13KB, home feed interleave logic), `expo/build-landing.mjs`, `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` (S3+CloudFront deploy scripts)
- **Landing deploy**: S3 bucket `ivxholding.com`, CloudFront distribution, `deploy-landing.mjs` handles upload + invalidation
- **Render plan**: FREE (512MB, 1 instance, no autoscaling)
- **Feed cache**: TTL 30s, `X-IVX-Cache: HIT/MISS` header confirmed
- **Load test results saved**: `/tmp/ivx_final_results.json`
- **APK**: `https://tmpfiles.org/wbwXuxlKrYiJ/app-release.apk` (v1.4.5, build 36)

## Relevant Files
- `backend/middleware/ivx-enterprise-middleware.ts` — Enterprise middleware (timeout, body limit, AI rate limit, observability, security headers, metrics)
- `backend/middleware/ivx-socket-auth.ts` — WS auth + rate limiting
- `backend/supabase/migrations/enterprise_indexes.sql` — 28+ indexes ready to apply
- `backend/express-chat-server.ts` — Redis adapter wiring + WS auth middleware
- `backend/hono.ts` — Enterprise middleware wired in, reduced log noise
- `backend/api/ivx-video-platform.ts` — Home-feed handler, `toHomeFeedDeal()` at line 522, `buildDealCardHtml` consumer
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` — Landing page HTML+CSS+JS (452KB); CSS for immersive cards added ~line 2134, `buildDealCardHtml` rewritten at ~line 6716
- `expo/ivxholding-landing/ivx-home-feed.js` — Home feed interleave logic; `buildVideoCard()` needs updating to immersive design
- `expo/build-landing.mjs` — Landing build script
- `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` — S3 + CloudFront deploy script (bucket: `ivxholding.com`)
